channel.title: cors on 胡思乱
channel.description: Recent content in cors on 胡思乱

item.title: 跨域问题记录
item.description: 记录跨域问题以及Nginx的对应配置 什么是跨源资源共享（CORS）？ 前端需要直接请求服务端接口出现跨域问题: Access to XMLHttpRequest at ‘https://test.xxx.com’ from origin ‘http://localhost:8080’ has been blocked by CORS policy: Response to preflight request doesn’t pass access control check: No ‘Access-Control-Allow-Origin’ header is present on the requested resource. 在使用Nginx做反向代理的情况，一般会进行如下配置 location / { ... add_header Access-Control-Allow-Origin "https://localhost:8080"; add_header Access-Control-Allow-Credentials true; add_header Access-Control-Expose-Headers FooBar; ... } 大多数情况可以解决问题，还有一些特殊情况，以下进行列举 情况一，Nginx反向代理服务端，服务端也进行了跨域设置 此时可能会出现以下错误: Access to XMLHttpRequest at ‘https://test.xxx.com/api/xxx' from origin ‘http://localhost:8080’ has been blocked by CORS policy: Response to preflight request doesn’t pass access control check: The ‘Access-Control-Allow-Origin’ header contains multiple values ‘http://localhost:8080, *’, but only one is allowed.
